CIT.notes: 25% opt-in legacy regime; 22% new concessional regime (Sec 115BAA); effective ~25.17% / ~22.87% incl surcharge+cess; surcharges apply on high income

VAT.notes: GST slabs: 0%/5%/12%/18%/28%; 18% is primary standard rate; 28% on luxury/demerit goods

IIT.notes: 30% top slab; surcharge 10%-37% on very high income; health+education cess 4%; new regime top 30%+25% surcharge=39%
